meta.title: 16Launcher — Minecraft launcher
meta.description: 16Launcher — the best choice for playing Minecraft: a fast, modern launcher with convenient content search and safe modpack downloads.

seo.articleNotFoundDescription: The requested news post was not found. Return to the launcher updates list.
seo.pageNotFoundDescription: The requested page was not found. Return to the home page.

features.title: Optimization
features.text: Maximum optimization — the launcher runs smoothly even on low-end PCs.

features.title: Content
features.text: Convenient in-launcher content search, plus easy creation and management of modpacks.

features.title: Security
features.text: The launcher is completely safe: no malware. Its source code is also open.

lines.rest: search, filters, and room for your modpacks!

settings.accentPart: Customize the look to your taste.

lines.rest: profile management, modpack creation, and configuration.

java.restPart: game settings tailored to your needs.

items.question: Is it safe?
items.answer: Yes. The launcher contains no malware and has open source code. Anyone can review the project code and verify its safety themselves.

items.question: Is it suitable for low-end PCs?
items.answer: Yes. The launcher is highly optimized and uses minimal system resources, ensuring stable performance even on weak devices.

items.question: Which Minecraft versions are supported?
items.answer: All Vanilla Minecraft versions are supported, as well as popular mod loaders: Forge, Fabric, Quilt, and NeoForge. You can also import your own versions and builds for convenient management through the launcher.

items.question: Can I install mods?
items.answer: Of course. Built-in content search lets you install mods in one click with automatic compatibility checks. You can also create and manage your own modpacks.

items.question: Do I need to install Java separately?
items.answer: No. The launcher will automatically download and configure the appropriate Java version when needed.

items.question: Can I create multiple profiles?
items.answer: Yes. Create separate profiles for different game versions, modpacks, and settings.

footer.disclaimer: 16Launcher is not an official product of Mojang or Microsoft.
